content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner/pyproject.toml:
     1	[project]
     2	name = "tb-difficulty-tuner"
     3	version = "0.1.0"
     4	description = "Terminal-Bench task difficulty tuning framework"
     5	readme = "README.md"
     6	requires-python = ">=3.12,<3.14"
     7	dependencies = [
     8	    "click>=8.1.0",
     9	    "rich>=13.0.0",
    10	    "pydantic>=2.0.0",
    11	    "toml>=0.10.2",
    12	    "anthropic>=0.40.0",
    13	    "openai>=1.0.0",
    14	    "pyyaml>=6.0.0",
    15	    "python-dotenv>=1.0.0",
    16	    "ruff>=0.8.0",
    17	    "fastapi>=0.115.0",
    18	    "uvicorn>=0.34.0",
    19	    "harbor @ git+https://github.com/laude-institute/harbor.git@47852c74ec7da74016becfb80e311caf7524b185",
    20	    "pinecone>=8.0.0",
    21	]
    22	
    23	[project.optional-dependencies]
    24	dev = [
    25	    "pytest>=8.0.0",
    26	    "pytest-asyncio>=0.24.0",
    27	]
    28	
    29	[project.scripts]
    30	tb-tune = "tb_difficulty_tuner.cli:main"
    31	
    32	[build-system]
    33	requires = ["hatchling"]
    34	build-backend = "hatchling.build"
    35	
    36	[tool.hatch.metadata]
    37	allow-direct-references = true
    38	
    39	[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
    40	packages = ["src/tb_difficulty_tuner"]
    41	
    42	[tool.ruff]
    43	line-length = 120
    44	target-version = "py312"
    45	
    46	[tool.ruff.lint]
    47	select = ["E", "F", "I", "W"]
    48	ignore = ["E501"]
    49	
    50	[dependency-groups]
    51	dev = [
    52	    "pytest>=9.0.2",
    53	]
    54
